summary: Iteration 86: Agreement Template Library + Auto-Generator for E-Sign - Comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: Admin template management, Partner agreement generation flow working. Fixed MongoDB _id serialization bug in clone endpoint.

ui_bugs.issue: View Agreement button opens Generate Agreement modal instead of showing existing agreement

action_items: Consider adding a separate 'View Agreement' action that shows the existing agreement details instead of reopening the generator modal
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: MongoDB _id serialization bug in clone endpoint - added clone.pop('_id', None) after insert_one
seed_data_creation: 3 seeded templates verified: Australia Standard, Australia Protection Policy, Canada Express Entry
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agreement Templates feature fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_agreement_templates.py cover all CRUD operations, authorization, agreement generation, PDF download. Frontend flows tested: Admin template management (list, create, edit, clone, delete, DOCX upload), Partner agreement generation (3-step modal: select template → fill variables → preview → generate). Client signing flow requires PA with client_user_id set. TEST_BackwardCompat_Client PA has active agreement for testing.

backend: POST /api/agreement-templates - create template with auto-detected placeholders
frontend: Admin: Agreement Templates page with table view
Admin: New Template form with all fields
Partner: Generate Agreement button in Financial Summary
Partner: 3-step modal (Select Template → Fill Variables → Preview & Send)
Partner: Auto-filled variables from PA data
Partner: Agreement generation with toast confirmation
